message:
refactor(styles): consolidate swipe indicators and control deck CSS

Style consolidation:
- swipe-indicators.css: Simplified animation keyframes, reduced duplication
- control-deck.css: Adjusted z-index and touch-action for mobile
- index.css: Added CSS custom property import

App.tsx:
- Added SwipeIndicators component integration

E2E test updates:
- command-palette-drift.e2e.ts: Minor assertion adjustments
- hotkeys-stack.e2e.ts: Updated selectors for new overlay behavior

These changes improve mobile swipe gesture feedback and ensure
consistent styling across the control deck and overlay systems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
